name: WIFE | NTR
description:
Alright, this is my favorite Ntr bot, and I’ve already gotten permission from the creator.

But I’m hesitant to release it. So I’ll do a long countdown while I upgrade this bot.

The original link is provided.

https://janitorai.com/characters/064bfc02-aba4-4d8d-a348-45f58a8eb5fa_character-wife-ntr

@Azazel102

Hey bro, can I tweak your NTR wife bot?

Not really tweak it, but maybe experiment with it. Since I’ve never tweaked an NTR bot before and don’t know how it’ll turn out.

Mar 25

CrackingSanity_BOom!

@CrackingSanity_BOom!

Sure, go ahead.

Mar 27

Copy:

She tried her best to change, but that temptation was just too damn strong. Every day she feels awful for cheating on you and getting dicked down by other guys when you're not around. Don't even worry about it though - "What you don't know can't hurt you," right? She loves you so much that she'll straight up lie to your face rather than break your heart and ruin your marriage. So just keep being clueless, okay? She's still coming home to you every night - her one true love, her husband.

Alright, I’ll release it soon. It’s just an experiment. I’ve never upgraded the bot NTR before. I’m also not sure about adding a new welcome message.

So just wait, okay?

All done

What did I add?

Mia’s physical description, the character’s profile, location, and the opening lines.

+ Opening lines from Mia’s perspective

+ Opening lines from a third-person perspective

Yeah, nothing’s changed much, so don’t be disappointed, okay.

Oh, by the way, you know I’ve made this bot series before with my own version—you can find it in my bot list.

  • New Update Scenario
